summary: Execute immediate follow-up with Rwanda Revenue Authority to secure a 30-minute discovery/demo meeting this week.
reasoning: This is the most impactful overdue sales action, directly supporting revenue and backlog reduction. The sales agent is idle, and a clear plan already exists—execute now and log outcomes.

task.title: RRA follow-up: call and email to book 30-minute discovery/demo
task.description: Execute the previously defined RRA follow-up plan: 1) Review CRM notes and last correspondence. 2) Call the primary contact now; if unavailable, attempt an alternate via the RRA switchboard. 3) Send a concise follow-up email proposing three time slots within the next 3 business days. 4) On contact, confirm needs, stakeholders, decision process, timeline, and any procurement/compliance requirements; offer a one-pager and a relevant case study. 5) Log outcomes in the CRM; either book the meeting or schedule the next follow-up within 48 hours and note blockers. 6) Escalate if contact details are stale or incorrect. Complete outreach and logging by EOD today.
